widget.name: Pwb Customize Container Data View
widget.description: Premium DataView Container widget supporting nested custom Mendix widgets and fluent Drag and Drop sorting.

property.caption: Items Source
property.description: Dynamic list of child items to display and sort inside the container. Each item receives its own row.

property.caption: Custom Option Content
property.description: Render custom Mendix widgets for each list item. You can place Cards, Buttons, or input widgets here.

property.caption: Enable Header
property.description: Enable or disable the custom header section above the content container.

property.caption: Header Content
property.description: Custom widgets to place in the header section above the drag-and-drop items.

property.caption: Enable Footer
property.description: Enable or disable the custom footer section below the content container.

property.caption: Footer Content
property.description: Custom widgets to place in the footer section below the drag-and-drop items.

property.caption: Enable Main Footer
property.description: Enable or disable the custom main footer section at the bottom of the lane.

property.caption: Main Footer Content
property.description: Custom widgets to place in the main footer section at the bottom of the lane.

property.caption: Enable Outer Footer
property.description: Enable or disable the custom outer footer section below the lane container card.

property.caption: Outer Footer Content
property.description: Custom widgets to place in the outer footer section below the lane container card.

property.caption: Enable Lane Title
property.description: Enable or disable the lane title section.

property.caption: Lane Title Text
property.description: Dynamic title for this lane/container.

property.caption: Lane Title Custom Widgets
property.description: Custom widgets to place in the lane title section (e.g. edit buttons, custom status badges).

property.caption: Sorted IDs Attribute
property.description: String Attribute on the parent context entity to store the comma-separated sorted IDs of the items (e.g. 'task_1,task_2,task_3').

property.caption: On Sort Complete Action
property.description: Microflow or nanoflow triggered immediately when drag-and-drop sorting completes, useful for committing order changes to the server.

property.caption: Read Only Mode
property.description: When enabled, the container displays child items in a read-only list where items cannot be dragged, dropped, or reordered.

property.caption: Sort ID Attribute
property.description: Attribute on the item entity (Integer, Decimal, or String) used to order items in Read Only Mode.

property.caption: Layout Direction
property.description: Select list orientation layout format. Vertical displays a column; Horizontal wraps items in a responsive grid row.

property.caption: Enable 2D Grid Drag & Drop
property.description: Enable 2D spatial reordering (both rows and columns) for grid layouts instead of 1D linear reordering.

property.caption: Drag Handle Position
property.description: Choose whether to show the drag handle icon on the left, or hide it entirely (dragging the whole card).

property.caption: Accent Color (Hex)
property.description: Theme color for active drag outlines, markers, and glows. Supports CSS Hex (e.g., #3b82f6), RGB, or standard HTML color names.

property.caption: Border Radius
property.description: Corner roundness of item rows and drop overlays. Specify standard CSS units (e.g., 16px, 8px, 0px).

property.caption: Drag Handle Icon
property.description: Select the icon type for the drag handle.

property.caption: Custom SVG HTML Code
property.description: Raw SVG markup for the drag handle (e.g. <svg ...><path .../></svg>). Only used when Drag Handle Icon is set to Custom SVG.

property.caption: Drag Handle Position
property.description: Choose whether to place the drag handle on the Left or Right side of the card.

property.caption: Drag Card Scale
property.description: Scale factor applied to the card while dragging (e.g. 0.95 to shrink, 1.05 to grow).

property.caption: Drag Card Opacity
property.description: Opacity of the card while dragging (0.0 to 1.0).

property.caption: Drag Card CSS Box Shadow
property.description: Custom CSS box-shadow value applied to the card while dragging (e.g. '0 20px 40px -10px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)'). Leave empty for default preset shadow.

property.caption: Hover Reveal Actions
property.description: When enabled, the actions section is hidden by default and only slides/fades in when hovering over the card.

property.caption: Animation Speed (ms)
property.description: Duration of card reordering transitions and wobbles in milliseconds.

property.caption: Wobble Shake Strength
property.description: Multiplier for the wobble shake amplitude when a drop is canceled/denied (e.g. 1.0 for default, 2.0 for double wobble, 0.0 to disable).

property.caption: Theme Preset
property.description: Choose a visual aesthetic theme preset for the card container layout.

property.caption: Dark Mode Behavior
property.description: Configure how the widget transitions to dark mode themes.

property.caption: Card Padding
property.description: Custom padding spacing inside each list row card (e.g. '12px 16px', '16px').

property.caption: Card Spacing Gap
property.description: Gap spacing between card rows inside the container (e.g. '12px', '8px', '20px').

property.caption: Inner Lane Card Class
property.description: CSS class to apply to the inner lane card container. Useful when you want to apply card styling (like card, shadow, border) to the lane card while keeping the outer footer outside of it.

property.caption: Enable Kanban Support
property.description: Turn on to allow dragging items across different widget instances (Kanban Column Mode). Dynamically reveals Kanban settings when enabled.

property.caption: Drag Group Name
property.description: Match with other container instances to allow dragging cards between them (e.g. 'project-kanban'). Both source and target must match.

property.caption: Column Value
property.description: The string value corresponding to this column status (e.g. 'ToDo', 'InProgress'). Used to update item category on card drop.

property.caption: Item Column Attribute
property.description: The string or enumeration attribute on the item entity to update when card is dropped in this column.

property.caption: Allowed Source Columns
property.description: Expression returning a comma-separated list of column values allowed to drop into this column (e.g. 'ToDo,InProgress'). If blank, all source columns are allowed.

property.caption: Item Drop Allowed Expression
property.description: Boolean expression evaluated on the dragged item itself to verify if it is allowed to drop in this column (e.g. $currentObject/Priority = 'High').

property.caption: Enable Actions Section
property.description: Enable a custom section (e.g. for action buttons, filter inputs) adjacent to the main items container.

property.caption: Actions Section Content
property.description: Custom widgets to place in this section (e.g. per-card action buttons).

property.caption: Position (Horizontal)
property.description: Choose whether to place the actions section on the Left or Right side of the card content.

property.caption: Position (Vertical)
property.description: Choose whether to place the actions section on the Top or Bottom side of the card content.

property.caption: Layout Style
property.description: Alignment style relative to the container: Side-by-Side (Row alignment) or Stacked (Column alignment).

property.caption: Section Size Ratio
property.description: How much space is allocated to the actions section. Presets automatically divide space cleanly.

property.caption: Custom Size Value
property.description: Custom CSS size value for the actions section (e.g. '200px', '2.5rem', '1fr'). Only applies when Size Ratio is set to Custom.

property.caption: Save Delay (ms)
property.description: Debounce saving to Mendix attribute and triggering actions in milliseconds. Reduces database saves during dragging (e.g. 300ms).

property.caption: Drag Start Vibration (ms)
property.description: Vibration duration in milliseconds when drag starts on supporting mobile devices. Use 0 to disable.

property.caption: Drop Vibration (ms)
property.description: Vibration duration in milliseconds when card is successfully dropped on supporting mobile devices. Use 0 to disable.

property.caption: Error Vibration (ms)
property.description: Vibration duration in milliseconds when drop is denied or canceled on supporting mobile devices. Use 0 to disable.
